programme.title: 2003. Max está tendo problemas para convencer Rick de que ele é verdadeiramente dedicado ao PPB All Starz. Max só quer jogar por amor ao jogo, mas Rick acha que ele deve fazer qualquer coisa para ganhar. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E19

programme.title: 2003. A etapa egípcia do Campeonato do Mundo culmina com a partida final, destacando a Dinastia F contra a Revolução BBA. Um dia antes da partida, Tyson fez Daichi praticar movimentos com ele que eles normalmente não estão acostumados a fazer. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E20

programme.title: 2003. Tyson está sentindo a pressão de ser campeão do mundo. Apesar do aviso de Hiro, uma equipe de televisão o segue por um dia, gravando todos os seus movimentos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E21

programme.title: 2003. Com Lee perdendo para Tala no início da partida, White Tiger X é um jogo perdido, e Kai agora se prepara para lutar pelos Blitzkrieg Boys. Essa rodada certamente será intensa, pois os antigos companheiros de equipe se enfrentam. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.sub-title: Ray e Kai o melhor confronto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E23

programme.title: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available
programme.desc: Beyblade

programme.title: 2002. Sango volta para a vila dos exterminadores para consertar seu Osso Voador. Indo para o poço, Agome encontra uma Nimenka, uma fruta que parece um rosto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Tudo o que Aconteceu na Noite de Togenkyo: Parte 1
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E03

programme.title: 2002. Tokajin sequestra Agome. Inuyasha escapa do jardim em miniatura com a ajuda de Mirok e os outros e vai salvar Agome. Enquanto escapa, ele encontra uma flor com o rosto de um velho sábio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Tudo o que Aconteceu na Noite de Togenkyo: Parte 2
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E04

programme.title: 2002. Sango retorna para a sua vila e conserta o Osso Voador. Ela também coloca o pai e as cinzas de seus companheiros para descansar. Quando ela está prestes a sair, ela é atacada. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E05

programme.title: 2002. Narak chama uma sacerdotisa chamada Tsubaki. Há cinquenta anos ela foi derrotada por Kikyo quando foi atrás da Jóia. Ela é uma sacerdotisa sombria que vendeu sua alma a um youkai para manter sua juventude e agora está atrás do sangue de Agome. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Sacerdotisa das Sombras; Uma Maldição de 50 Anos
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E06

programme.title: 2002. Agome luta contra a maldição colocada por Tsubaki, uma sacerdotisa sombria. Enquanto isso, Kikyo aparece diante de Tsubaki. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Kikyou Aparece! O Uso do Shikigami
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E07

programme.title: 2002. A maldição de Tsubaki rouba a consciência de Agome. Agome esquece o Japão feudal em um mundo ilusório. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E08

programme.title: 2002. Tsubaki visita a mansão onmyoji onde ela já treinou e planeja abrir uma porta proibida com o poder da Jóia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Sacerdotisa Azul e a Sacerdotisa Vermelha que Bloqueiam o Caminho
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E09

programme.title: 2002. Tsubaki é uma sacerdotisa que foi considerada a par com Kikyo. Ela estava com raiva porque a Jóia não lhe foi confiada, então se tornou uma sacerdotisa sombria. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Karon, O Demônio Gigante da Torre
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E10

programme.title: 2002. Uma noite, alguém possui Sango para atacar Mirok. O grupo examina um youkai que eles suspeitam estar por trás disso, mas estão enganados. Mirok é possuído em seguida e ataca Sango. Shippo tenta fugir, mas é encurralado por uma pequena sombra. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E11

programme.title: 2002. Há uma fenda na barreira de Narak. Mas é o começo do mês, e quando a noite cai, Inuyasha perde seus poderes, e a busca por Narak é adiada. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Barreira de Narak; A Decisão de Kagura
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E12

programme.title: 2002. Kagura se aproxima de Sesshomaru e diz a ele para matar Narak, mas Sesshoumaru se recusa. Enquanto Inuyasha e os outros procuram por Kagura, eles percebem que Narak é um meio-youkai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E13

programme.title: 2002. Shippo recebe uma carta desafiando-o para uma batalha. O remetente da carta é Soten Raijyu, e ele ainda é apenas uma criança. Ele investigou Inuyasha e os outros e determinou que eles eram muito fortes, então ele focou sua atenção em Shippo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E14

programme.title: 2002. Um youkai nascido de um pedaço de carne que Narak descartou se transforma em um homem sem rosto e rouba o rosto bonito de Muso, um monge viajante. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E15

programme.title: 2002. Muso ataca Agome e Inuyasha o destrói com sua Ferida do Vento. Narak, que estava assistindo ao evento, diz a Kagura para contar a Inuyasha onde Muso foi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E16

programme.title: 2002. Muso se regenera e Miroku diz a Inuyasha que o coração do youkai fica na cicatriz em forma de aranha. Kagura interfere e os insetos tiram o fragmento de Muso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Batalha de Três até a Morte
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E17

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha visita Totosai em busca de uma técnica que pode romper a barreira de Narak. Lá ele conhece Bunza. Os dois fazem como Totosai os ordena. Bunza age como se fosse o discípulo mais velho, mas acaba entrando em colapso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E18

programme.title: 2002. Miuga entrega uma mensagem para Totosai. Ele diz que a Tessaiga ficará mais forte se cortar derrotar um poderoso youkai. O grupo procura então os youkais morcegos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Mãe e os Sentimentos de Shiori
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E19

programme.title: 2002. O youkai morcego tenta destruir a aldeia junto com a mãe de Shiori. Inuyasha é bloqueado pela barreira da menina e não consegue derrotá-lo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Tessaiga Vermelha que Quebra a Barreira
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E20

programme.title: 2002. A tribo youkais Gatos do Fogo ataca do oeste. Seu objetivo é obter os fragmentos da Jóia de Agome, bem como se vingar de Sesshomaru e Inuyasha, filhos do grande cão youkai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Conspiração dos Quatro Youkais Gatos de Fogo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E21

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha corta a barreira e junto com o Kuga, eles entram no castelo. Enquanto isso, Mirok e Sango caíram sob um feitiço, e Agome está presa em uma prisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Alvos são Sesshomaru e Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E22

programme.title: 2002. O Rei Pantera, o general da tribo Pantera, começa a se mover com o poder da Jóia. Inuyasha e Sesshomaru atacam a múmia. Enquanto isso, Kuga, Mirok e os outros levam Agome e os outros para um local seguro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Gatos de Fogo e a Espada de Dois Caninos
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E23

programme.title: 2002. Sango é convidada a matar um youkai por um jovem senhor chamado Kuranosuke, que se apaixonou por ela seis anos atrás. Kuranosuke tem aparência, status e riqueza. Sango está confusa sobre como ela recusará sua proposta de casamento. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E24

programme.title: 2002. A Tessaiga está equipada com uma técnica que pode romper barreiras. Jaken planeja roubá-la de Inuyasha, mas seus planos fracassam continuamente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Plano de Jaken para Roubar Tessaiga
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E25

programme.title: 2002. Narak diz a Sesshomaru que ele devolverá Rin se ele matar Inuyasha, mas Sesshomaru se recusa e vai até o castelo dele. Enquanto isso, Agome detecta a presença da Jóia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Sesshomaru e o Sequestro de Rin
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E26

programme.title: 2002. Narak está tentando absorver Sesshomaru para que ele possa obter os poderes de um youkai completo. Mas Inuyasha rompe sua barreira e interfere. Quando Narak vê que o jogo foi virado, ele foge. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E27

programme.title: 2002. Agome retorna aos dias atuais. Ela está ocupada se preparando para um simulado de dois dias. Enquanto isso, Sango está preocupada com Kohaku, que foi levado por Kagura. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Conexão Entre o Presente e a Época das Guerras
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E01

programme.title: 2002. Ayame, uma youkai loba, aparece diante de Kuga e diz a ele que é sua noiva. Mas Kuga é loucamente apaixonado por Agome. Em sua fuga, Kuga encontra o castelo de Narak. Ayame vai atrás dele e é atacada por um youkai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Youkai Loba e a Grande Promessa
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E02

programme.title: 2002. Ayame leva Kuga para parar a luta de seus companheiros. Mas ela não tem intenção de retornar para ele. O youkai que estava atrás dos fragmentos da Jóia ataca. Kuga luta para proteger Agome e Ayame. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Proposta de Casamento Super Veloz
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E03

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha e seu grupo conhecem uma senhora que é uma falsa exorcista. A fim de descobrir por que tantos youkais apareceram recentemente, eles vão ao Castelo que parece ser a origem desse problema. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Aumento da Energia Maligna; A Cabeça do Demônio
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E04

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha luta contra o senhor do Castelo. Sango ouve que Mirok foi para o porão com a princesa e vai atrás dele. Agome encontra o cadáver da verdadeira princesa no quarto do lorde. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E05

programme.title: 2002. Enquanto procura por Narak, Kikyo conhece Kansuke, um velho bandido que está gravemente doente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E06

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha e seu grupo aceitam um trabalho para se livrar dos macacos, que estão destruindo campos. Eles encontram três macacos, Gon, Bun e Ken. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Três Youkais do Deus Macaco
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E07

programme.title: 2002. Agome pega um resfriado e retorna aos dias atuais. Inuyasha está preocupado com ela. Ele reúne muitos alimentos nutritivos derrotando vários youkais. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Confronto Entre Inuyasha e Hojo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E08

programme.title: 2002. O irmão mais novo de Agome, Sota, se apaixonou por Hitomi, uma colega de classe. Inicialmente, ele pede a Inuyasha um conselho, mas no final, ele decide dizer a ela que a ama com um plano orquestrado por Agome. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E09

programme.title: 2002. Tesso, um youkai de rato que tem medo de gatos, se transforma em um curandeiro e persegue Kuroro. Inuyasha e seu grupo encontram aldeões que confundem Kirara com Kuroro e tentam expulsá-la. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Espiritualista Mistérioso e a Kirara Negra
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E10

programme.title: 2002. Kikyo foi trazida de volta à vida por uma das técnicas secretas de Urasue. Ela conhece Monju, que está na mesma situação. Monju não tem almas suficientes. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E11

programme.title: 2002. Em uma certa aldeia, Inuyasha e sua equipe estão cercados por aldeões que não gostam de Mirok. Quando eles perguntam por que, eles dizem que Mirok tem feito muitas más ações. Mirok diz que ele é inocente, e suspeita que isso seja obra de um impostor... Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E12

programme.title: 2002. Inuyasha e sua equipe se encontram com Izumo, que está investigando o segredo da criação da Jóia. Eles ouvem que um youkai apareceu e vão investigar uma aldeia próxima. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Criadores da Jóia de Quatro Almas: Parte 1
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E13

programme.title: 2002. Agome e os outros são sequestrados por youkais que estão usando falsas Jóias. Inuyasha vai salvá-los, mas Gyu-Oh fica em seu caminho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Criadores da Jóia de Quatro Almas: Parte 2
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E14

programme.title: 2002. Os insetos venenosos de Narak aparecem. Sesshomaru vai atrás deles. Enquanto isso, Jaken é picado por um inseto venenoso e está morrendo. Rin fica com ele e tenta salvá-lo. Ela vai ao campo de Jinenji para obter um fruto do Sennenso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E15

programme.title: 2003. Kirara desaparece e Sango está preocupada. Shippo deduz as razões de Kirara para desaparecer e culpa Inuyasha. Naquele momento, um som estrondoso vem da floresta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E16

programme.title: 2003. Agome é atraída para uma caverna por uma voz pedindo ajuda. Ao entrar ela encontra Kikyo, que não tem almas suficientes e enfraqueceu-se. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Kikyo e Kagome Sozinhas Numa Caverna
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E17

programme.title: 2003. Ginta e Hakkaku brigam com Kuga e acabam trabalhando separadamente. Ao fazer isso, eles encontram o grupo de Sesshomaru. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Kuga e Sesshomaru, O Perigoso Confronto
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T04E18

programme.title: 2003. Garamaru, um youkai mariposa, prendeu Agome e os outros em um casulo e agora eles estão presos em seus pesadelos. Na vida real, Inuyasha está lutando sozinho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Pesadelo Real! A Luta na Floresta do Desespero
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E01

programme.title: 2003. A neve está caindo fora de época. Mirok é sequestrado por Koyuki, uma mulher misteriosa. Agome e os outros ouvem de um caçador e sua esposa sobre um youkai da neve. Quando eles vão procurá-lo, eles encontram Sango, que se perdeu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Sete Anos Depois; As Neves Eternas
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E02

programme.title: 2003. Um ogro gigante chamado Kyokotsu aparece nas montanhas ao norte e devora outros youkais como a tribo de lobos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Os Youkais Lobos são Atacados por um Zumbi
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E03

programme.title: 2003. O Exército dos Sete foi trazido de volta à vida. O calvário enviado para derrotá-los é dizimado pelo segundo mais forte, Yakotsu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Fátima Noya (Sango), Fábio Lucindo (Mirok) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T05E04

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Mouth on Campus
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) declines running for the Teacher of the Year award so Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) can win.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Liar, Liar Your Versace's on Fire
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) test lie-detector bracelets with not-so-good results.

programme.title: City Eats: Charleston - Taste of the Islands
programme.desc: Preston and Sonia Diedrick create a joyful celebration of Caribbean heritage right in the heart of Charleston; with reggae in the air and spices lingering before you reach the door, dishes like curry goat and jerk chicken deliver.

programme.title: City Eats: Charleston - Bintu Atelier
programme.desc: Chef Bintou N'Daw cooks from a place of purpose, bringing the warmth, strength, and heritage of Senegal into Charleston's dining scene; Bintü Atelier shows Charleston how cuisine can heal, teach, and unite, one plate at a time.

programme.title: Family Time - There Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Anthony, a construction worker, wins $500,000 in the lottery, enabling him to move his family to a middle-class neighborhood.

programme.title: Family Time - No Happy Ending
programme.desc: With the kids spending a few days at the grandparents' house, Anthony and Lisa plan a romantic weekend at home.

programme.title: Family Time - The Note
programme.desc: Devin turns into a ladies man after taking advice from Anthony.

programme.title: Family Time - The Tennis Bracelet
programme.desc: After Anthony purchases a diamond tennis bracelet for his mother's 65th birthday, him and Lisa argue about who he loves more.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Don't Push Me
programme.desc: Everyone has a line that shouldn't be crossed.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Ribs and Pasta
programme.desc: Chef Biff Smith of Mobile Chef Atlanta Catering squares off against Chef Terrell Taylor of Grill Effect BBQ; the challenge features the classic combination of ribs and pasta.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Chicken and Avocado
programme.desc: Adaya and Jay throw down for a chance to compete in the semifinals; the contestants must incorporate chicken and avocado in their dishes, but the challenge doesn't come without a twist in the form of Phillip Ashley Chocolates.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Pulled Pork and Leafy Greens
programme.desc: The stage is set for the first thrilling semifinal matchup, Hanashi Weathers faces off against Steve Morales; the challenge is a mouthwatering pulled pork with a side of flavorful leafy greens; a surprise awaits the pitmasters.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Turkey and Sourdough
programme.desc: Adaya Nijay and Biff Smith throw down in this semifinal match; the pitmasters must create dishes featuring turkey and sourdough; an added surprise as Biff and Adaya must incorporate Morelli's Gourmet Ice Cream into their creations.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Duck and Carrots
programme.desc: Biff Smith and Hanashi Weathers face off in the first round of the finals; they will be grilling up succulent duck with a side of carrots; each of the pitmasters must incorporate The Scott Group BBQ sauce of their choice into their dishes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Shellfish and Grits
programme.desc: It's a barbecue showdown from the sea; Biff and Hanashi look to bring their absolute best and leave it all out on the grill; shellfish and grits are on the menu with a surprising twist of their choice of select Anteel Tequila.

programme.title: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Faith falls ill two weeks before she is going to marry Norman; secrets start to flare up, and the couple realizes that love and sacrifice go hand-in-hand.

programme.title: And Then There Was You
programme.desc: Natalie picks up the pieces of her life after her husband leaves and falls in love with a man with secrets.

programme.title: Playing Sam
programme.desc: After her ex-boyfriend's acting career takes off, Samantha picks up the pieces of her broken heart and (so-called) acting career to rediscover her essence as a modern Latinx actress.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Seafood Sunday
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out a seafood menu that she prepares on Seafood Sundays, making lobster pasta and fresh salmon cake served over mixed greens.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Comfort Foods
programme.desc: Yo-Yo shows viewers her family's comfort food, coconut braised oxtails in a savory sauce served with red beans and rice makes her family love pulling up a seat to the table.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Michael's Band
programme.desc: When Michael's former bandmate (Clarence Clemons) comes to town for a gig, Michael agrees to sit in as the band's piano player.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Lady Is Not a Tramp
programme.desc: Michael fears the worst when he discovers condoms in Claire's backpack; Jr. accidentally gives Kady a dose of dog medicine.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Tiger Hoods
programme.desc: Everyone engages in an elaborate cover-up to help Steve ditch school and golf in a celebrity tournament.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Analyze Dis
programme.desc: Dr. Joyce Brothers (guest starring as herself) is called in to counsel a combative Steve and Regina (Steve Harvey, Wendy Raquel Robinson).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Daddy Daddy
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) reluctantly allows Romeo (Merlin Santana) to move in while finishing out his senior year of high school.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Me, Me and Miss Jones
programme.desc: Steve and Romeo (Steve Harvey, Merlin Santana) become rivals for the affections of a 25-year-old swimsuit model.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - No Free Samples
programme.desc: Rap artist Lil' Bow Wow (guest starring as himself) wants to sample an old hit of Steve's (Steve Harvey) group, the Hi-Tops. Jermaine Dupri and Ron Isley also guest star.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Mother and Child Reunion
programme.desc: Romeo's mother shows up and announces that she is leaving her husband to start a new life in Chicago.

programme.title: Nochebuena
programme.desc: A return home on Christmas Eve transports Junior back to a familiar life of old traditions, lots of coquito, and the one that got away.

programme.title: Holly Day
programme.desc: Holly, a tightly-wound successful businesswoman, spends much of her life running from the ghosts of her past, but this holiday they come back to find her.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Ultrasound
programme.desc: Vanessa and Jr. prepare for their first ultrasound; the grandparents-to-be go to extremes to find out the sex of the baby; Franklin is worried that Kady will dump him for Willie K.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - While Out
programme.desc: Claire throws a wild party in her parents' absence; a drunken Tony runs naked through the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie (1966)
programme.desc: A TV cameraman hurt while covering a football game is told by his brother-in-law how to get a big insurance settlement.

programme.title: The Mechanic (1972)
programme.desc: A master hit man (Charles Bronson) teaches the trade to an eager young man (Jan-Michael Vincent) who idolizes him.

programme.title: Hard Eight (1996)
programme.desc: A stranger (Philip Baker Hall) mentors a young Reno gambler (John C. Reilly) who weds a hooker (Gwyneth Paltrow) and befriends a vulgar casino regular.

programme.title: Whiplash (2014)
programme.desc: A first-year music student (Miles Teller) wins a seat behind the drums in a jazz band led by a teacher (J.K. Simmons) who uses fear and intimidation to push his students to perfection.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights (2004)
programme.desc: A high-school football coach (Billy Bob Thornton) in Odessa, Texas, tries to lead his players (Derek Luke, Jay Hernandez) to the state championship.

programme.title: Stand by Me (1986)
programme.desc: A boy (Wil Wheaton) and his three buddies set out in the summer of 1959 on a hike to find a dead body.

programme.title: The Relic (1997)
programme.desc: A homicide detective (Tom Sizemore) helps a biologist (Penelope Ann Miller) hunt a giant creature that is killing people in a Chicago museum.

programme.title: Event Horizon (1997)
programme.desc: A spaceship missing for seven years finally re-emerges and sends out a distress signal. But when a team is sent out to investigate, they discover that something sinister has taken over the craft.

programme.title: Species (1995)
programme.desc: A scientist (Ben Kingsley) leads the hunt for a genetically engineered creature who morphs into a human blonde and tries to reproduce in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Species II (1998)
programme.desc: A half-alien female (Natasha Henstridge) escapes from a government compound to search for the half-alien male who has been raping and fatally impregnating women.

programme.title: Species III (2004)
programme.desc: An alien hybrid beauty follows her overwhelming, but deadly, urge to mate while commandos hunt her down.

programme.title: Species: The Awakening (2007)
programme.desc: With help from her uncle, a woman (Helena Mattsson) who is a half-human, half-alien clone searches for the scientist who created her.

programme.title: The Dark Half (1993)
programme.desc: A Maine professor's (Timothy Hutton) hidden bad side comes alive under his notorious but successful pen name.

programme.title: The Return of the Living Dead (1985)
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Living Dead (1985)
programme.desc: Punk rockers, a cremator and medical-supply workers have a problem with zombies in Kentucky.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side (1986)
programme.desc: An American Indian helps a broke and homeless family (JoBeth Williams, Craig T. Nelson), once again prey to a poltergeist (Julian Beck).

programme.title: Poltergeist III (1988)
programme.desc: Destructive demons follow a little girl (Heather O'Rourke) sent to live with her aunt (Nancy Allen) and uncle (Tom Skerritt) in a Chicago high-rise.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (1979)
programme.desc: A couple (James Brolin, Margot Kidder) battle a demonic presence in their new home, the location of many gruesome murders a year earlier.

programme.title: Carrie (1976)
programme.desc: A social misfit (Sissy Spacek) with psychic powers wreaks havoc at her prom to get even with pranksters.

programme.title: Cujo (1983)
programme.desc: Bitten by a rabid bat, a huge dog traps a Maine woman (Dee Wallace) and her young son (Danny Pintauro) in their Ford Pinto.

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: A family's life in small-town Maine is shattered by the evil unleashed from an ancient American Indian burial ground.

programme.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space (1988)
programme.desc: Teens (Grant Cramer, Suzanne Snyder) flee from large clowns who shoot people with popcorn and spin cotton-candy webs.

programme.title: The Burning (1981)
programme.desc: A disfigured caretaker with shears returns to the summer camp where campers played a prank on him five years earlier.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: If a Tree Falls in the Forest…
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate for money to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards joins the top-rated show on television, "The Running Man," a deadly competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: Serpico (1973)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Frank Serpico, who sacrificed his career to expose widespread corruption in the NYPD.

programme.title: Downsizing (2017)
programme.desc: A man joins a community of miniaturized people after undergoing a process to shrink himself. As he gets to know his new neighbors and surroundings, he soon learns that living in a tiny suburb comes with its own set of huge problems.

programme.title: Nebraska (2013)
programme.desc: A man accompanies his aging, cantankerous father on a long road trip from Billings, Mont., to Lincoln, Neb., to claim a cash prize that might not actually exist.

programme.title: The Delta Force (1986)
programme.desc: Terrorists reroute a passenger jet from Athens to Beirut, where commandos (Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin) are waiting to negotiate.

programme.title: Hannah and Her Sisters (1986)
programme.desc: Hannah's (Mia Farrow) husband (Michael Caine) has an affair with one sister, and her ex-husband (Woody Allen) marries the other.

programme.title: Desperate Hours (1990)
programme.desc: An escaped convict (Mickey Rourke) and his two partners invade the home of an estranged Utah couple (Anthony Hopkins, Mimi Rogers).

programme.title: Gorky Park (1983)
programme.desc: A Moscow detective's investigation of a bizarre triple murder leads him to run-ins with the KGB and an American tycoon.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-lover's murder creates problems for the married head (Nick Nolte) of an elite police unit in early '50s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Jennifer 8 (1992)
programme.desc: An ex-Los Angeles detective (Andy Garcia) turns small-town policeman and falls for a blind woman (Uma Thurman) vulnerable to a killer.

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs (1991)
programme.desc: An FBI trainee (Jodie Foster) seeks advice from a brilliant, psychopathic prisoner (Anthony Hopkins) to catch a killer who skins his victims.

programme.title: Hannibal (2001)
programme.desc: Seven years have passed since Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins) escaped from custody. The doctor is now at large in Europe. Mason Verger (Gary Oldman) remembers Lecter too, and is obsessed with revenge.

programme.title: Child's Play (1988)
programme.desc: A struggling single mother unknowingly gifts her son a doll imbued with a serial killer's consciousness.

programme.title: Hoodlum (1997)
programme.desc: Mobster Ellsworth "Bumpy" Johnson (Laurence Fishburne) vies with rival Dutch Schultz (Tim Roth) for control of illegal gambling in the 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: Unseen (2023)
programme.desc: Sam, a gas station clerk, receives a random call from Emily, a nearly blind woman who's running from her murderous ex in the woods. Using a phone, Sam becomes Emily's only chance for survival as she guides the terrified woman through a video call.

programme.title: American Gigolo (1980)
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort falls in love with a big shot's wife and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: F/X (1986)
programme.desc: Federal agents hire a special-effects man (Bryan Brown) to stage the fake assassination of a mob witness.

programme.title: FX2 (1991)
programme.desc: A former movie special-effects man uses tricks of the trade to expose a plot involving stolen gold and corrupt cops with a private eye, while they evade a mysterious assassin.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes (2018)
programme.desc: When Gnomeo and Juliet first arrive in London, their biggest concern is getting their new garden ready for spring. After someone kidnaps their garden gnomes, the duo calls on famous Detective Sherlock Gnomes and his sidekick Watson to solve the case.

programme.title: Foul Play (1978)
programme.desc: A San Francisco police detective (Chevy Chase) protects a librarian (Goldie Hawn) who knows too much about a plot to kill the pope.

programme.title: Airplane! (1980)
programme.desc: A pilot (Robert Hays) afraid to fly follows his stewardess ex-girlfriend (Julie Hagerty) and must take over for the poisoned crew.

programme.sub-title: If a Tree Falls in the Forest…

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: Moscow, Washington and a CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) track a renegade Soviet captain (Sean Connery) and his new submarine.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge (2016)
programme.desc: During World War II's Battle of Okinawa, U.S. Army medic Desmond Doss (Andrew Garfield) braves bullets, grenades and snipers while single-handedly evacuating the wounded from behind enemy lines.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon (2016)
programme.desc: A dramatization of the disaster in April 2010, when the offshore drilling rig called the Deepwater Horizon exploded, resulting in the worst oil spill in American history.

programme.title: The Cut (2024)
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Silent Planet (2024)
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Semper Fi (2007)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Vince DiPersio documents the experience of Jeff Key, a Marine who served in Iraq while hiding his homosexuality.

programme.title: 2nd Chance (2022)
programme.desc: Richard Davis invents a concealable bulletproof vest and shoots himself 196 times over the course of his career to prove the effectiveness of his vests.

programme.title: The Untouchables (1987)
programme.desc: Though Prohibition agent Eliot Ness attempts to take Al Capone down, even his best efforts fail due to widespread corruption within the Windy City's police force.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Uncommon Valor (1983)
programme.desc: A colonel with a sponsor leads five Marine veterans into Laos to find his son and others missing in action.

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers (Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan) become pawns of a mysterious woman who threatens their friends and family and uses technology to control their actions.

programme.title: Virtuosity (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-cop doing prison time chases a virtual-reality killer from the program onto the Los Angeles streets.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers (2006)
programme.desc: Some of the servicemen who raised the U.S. flag on Mount Suribachi during the Battle of Iwo Jima at the end of World War II live to hear of their status as heroes.

programme.title: Top Gun (1986)
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Pete's dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: Cold War veteran Stan Hurley takes CIA black ops recruit Mitch Rapp under his wing, and they join forces with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative who wants to start a global war.

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

programme.title: The Gunman (2015)
programme.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Sean Penn) who has PTSD tries to reconnect with his longtime lover, but must first find out who wants him dead... and why.

programme.title: Uncommon Valor (1983)
programme.desc: A colonel with a sponsor leads five Marine veterans into Laos to find his son and others missing in action.

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers (Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan) become pawns of a mysterious woman who threatens their friends and family and uses technology to control their actions.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Walking Out (2017)
programme.desc: When a city teen travels to Montana to go hunting with his estranged father, the trip becomes a battle for survival when they encounter a grizzly bear.

programme.title: Day of the Fight (2023)
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.title: Marathon Man (1976)
programme.desc: The CIA and a Nazi death-camp dentist (Laurence Olivier) chase a New York graduate student (Dustin Hoffman).

programme.title: The Contractor (2022)
programme.desc: When his new assignment goes awry, an elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder (1991)
programme.desc: Two Navy pilots (Willem Dafoe, Brad Johnson) hatch a rogue mission to bomb Hanoi with a special low-altitude plane.

programme.title: Anthropoid (2016)
programme.desc: In December 1941, two Czech soldiers (Cillian Murphy, Jamie Dornan) parachute into their occupied homeland to assassinate Nazi officer Reinhard Heydrich (Detlef Bothe).

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a family's new home.

programme.title: Pretty Red Dress (2022)
programme.desc: The story of Travis, Candice and their daughter, Kenisha, and their relationships with the same red dress.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.sub-title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: All the World Is Sleeping (2021)
programme.desc: A young mother in New Mexico sinks deeper into addiction while struggling to care for her daughter.

programme.title: Regarding Us (2025)
programme.desc: After losing her teaching career, A transgender woman has a profound impact on the lives of two children.

programme.title: Boys and Girls (2000)
programme.desc: Two longtime friends (Freddie Prinze Jr., Claire Forlani), each with a string of failed romances, wonder if they should date each other.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: Chasing Amy (1997)
programme.desc: A young cartoonist falls for a fellow artist, a lesbian with a long list of former lovers, creating an unexpected relationship.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isn't hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Dreamland (2019)
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Hurt (2023)
programme.desc: When the man she loves, Holger Olsen, goes off to fight in the Civil War, Vivienne Le Coudy must fend for herself in a place controlled by a corrupt mayor and his unscrupulous business partner.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: The Violent Heart (2020)
programme.desc: Long-buried secrets threaten to tear a couple apart.

programme.title: Cusp (2021)
programme.desc: Filmmakers Parker Hill and Isabel Bethencourt share a fascinating glimpse into authentic American girlhood, where the strictures of adolescence clash with the growing desire for personal agency.

programme.title: Regarding Us (2025)
programme.desc: After losing her teaching career, A transgender woman has a profound impact on the lives of two children.

programme.title: Big Night (1996)
programme.desc: Two Italian brothers hope to save their failing restaurant by preparing a feast for bandleader Louis Prima.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert (2015)
programme.desc: Gertrude Bell's life as an explorer, cartographer, and archaeologist for the British Empire.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian count's (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: Winchester (2018)
programme.desc: Ensconced in her sprawling San Jose, California mansion, eccentric firearm heiress Sarah Winchester believes she is haunted by the souls of people killed by the Winchester repeating rifle.
